summary.title: Piyush Jain
summary.description: is a Data Analyst and Full Stack Developer with expertise in SQL, Python, Power BI, and the MERN Stack. Skilled in data cleaning, ETL pipelines, KPI tracking, and interactive dashboard development. Experienced in building scalable web applications and delivering actionable business insights through structured data analysis. Currently pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science with hands-on internship experience at HL Tech India & BSY Consulting and multiple successful freelance projects.
